title: ctenitis grisebachii
intro: Ctenitis grisebachii, also known as Gray's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis grisebachii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ctenitis grisebachii can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
